label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So there's a white elephant gift exchange with Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each person starts with a different colored present. The question is, after a series of swaps, what present does Alice end up with? First, I need to track each swap step by step. Let me jot down the initial presents: - Alice: white - Bob: green - Claire: yellow - Dave: purple - Eve: pink Now, the swaps happen in this order: 1. Alice and Dave swap 2. Claire and Dave swap 3. Dave and Eve swap 4. Bob and Dave swap 5. Dave and Claire swap Each time, two people exchange their current gifts. So I need to track who has what after each swap. Let me start with the first swap: Alice and Dave. Initially, Alice has white and Dave has purple. After swapping, Alice gets purple and Dave gets white. So now: - Alice: purple - Bob: green - Claire: yellow - Dave: white - Eve: pink Second swap: Claire and Dave. Claire has yellow, Dave has white. After swapping, Claire gets white and Dave gets yellow. Now: - Alice: purple - Bob: green - Claire: white - Dave: yellow - Eve: pink Third swap: Dave and Eve. Dave has yellow, Eve has pink. After swapping, Dave gets pink, Eve gets yellow. Now: - Alice: purple - Bob: green - Claire: white - Dave: pink - Eve: yellow Fourth swap: Bob and Dave. Bob has green, Dave has pink. After swapping, Bob gets pink and Dave gets green. Now: - Alice: purple - Bob: pink - Claire: white - Dave: green - Eve: yellow Fifth swap: Dave and Claire. Dave has green, Claire has white. After swapping, Dave gets white and Claire gets green. Final positions: - Alice: purple - Bob: pink - Claire: green - Dave: white - Eve: yellow So, at the end, Alice has the purple present. The options are (D) purple present. Let me check again to make sure I didn't make any mistakes in the swaps. Let me go through each swap again step by step. 1. Alice and Dave: Alice gets purple, Dave gets white. Correct. 2. Claire and Dave: Claire gets white, Dave gets yellow. Correct. 3. Dave and Eve: Dave gets pink, Eve gets yellow. Correct. 4. Bob and Dave: Bob gets pink, Dave gets green. Correct. 5. Dave and Claire: Dave gets white, Claire gets green. Correct. Yes, Alice never swapped
